title: Marketing Analytics Lead | Based in Europe
required_skills: hiring and team leadership track record
business acumen / translating data into business decisions
matched_skills: data analysis (4+ years across multiple industries)
data visualization (Power BI PL-300, Qlik Sense, Looker Studio)
multi-channel marketing analytics (Affiliates, PPC, Influencers, SEO adjacent)
missing_skills: SQL (not mentioned in CV tools or experience)
Tableau (CV has BI tools but not Tableau specifically)
proven hiring and direct team-building leadership (CV shows coordination, not people-management)
core_responsibilities: Set and uphold the standard for data-driven decision-making across marketing channels
Lead end-to-end marketing analytics projects, translating raw data into growth opportunities
Build, hire, mentor and inspire a high-performing team of analysts
Collaborate with marketing channel leads (Affiliates, Influencers, PPC, SEO, PMMs) to align analytical roadmaps
Own delivery lifecycle from requirements refinement to backlog prioritisation
recommended_emphasis: Emphasise marketing attribution experience explicitly (multi-touch, budget variance, spend attribution across workstreams at HSBC)
Highlight cross-channel analytics coverage mapping CV experience to Affiliates, Influencers, PPC, Organic channels
Lead with stakeholder management and C-level storytelling as differentiator
Showcase BI tool breadth (Power BI PL-300 certified, Qlik, Looker Studio) as proxy for Tableau proficiency
Surface agile delivery ownership (backlog, sprints, JIRA) to address delivery lifecycle requirement
Address SQL gap transparently or de-emphasise tools section
Reframe coordination and cross-functional collaboration at Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC as proto-leadership
Use quantified impact bullets (USD 8M programme, 4.6M CNY ROI, 4,000+ attendee events) to signal business acumen
